pr.title: RHOAIENG-59701: Feature Store config not mounted into workbench — NotebookConfigMapReconciler creates ConfigMap but no component mounts it
pr.body:
The example code in generateFeatureStoreCode() used a fabricated path
(/opt/app-root/config/feast_configs/fs_banking.yaml) that does not match
the actual mount path used by the Feast operator's NotebookConfigMapReconciler.
Updated the path to /opt/app-root/src/feature_store.yaml to align with
the operator's volume mount convention. The variable name was also
simplified from fs_banking to fs since the path is now generic.

Closes [RHOAIENG-59701](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-59701)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Workflow Validation <workflow-validation@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Improvements**
  * Generated feature store initialization now uses a generic YAML-based configuration, making generated code more flexible and reusable.
* **Tests**
  * Updated tests to reflect the new YAML-based initialization flow and expected single initialization behavior.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
